use_cases: Interactive avatar or mascot for websites and landing pages
Animated character for onboarding flows or tutorials
Bot or AI assistant visual representation in chat interfaces
Personalized character display for user profiles
ai_summary: A pseudo-3D character built with Zdog featuring a stylized head with expressive bezier-curved eyes and skin-toned rendering. The character supports rotation interactions and uses flat color palettes with skin highlights and shadows for depth. Designed as a reusable interactive mascot that can serve as avatars, bot representations, or decorative elements in web applications.
